texto: Are you afraid in there?" she said softly, as the men called out for them."No," he said. "I'm not afraid. You lock me in. They won't get me."She closed the door on the little white face, turned the key in the lock. Then she slipped the key into her pocket. The lock was hidden by a pivoting device shaped like a light switch. It was impossible to see the outline of the cupboard in the paneling of the wall. Yes, he'd be safe there. She was sure of it.The girl murmured his name and laid her palm flat on the wooden panel."I'll come back for you later. I promise.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tatiana de Rosnay: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Are you afraid in there?" she said softly, as the men called out for them."No," he said. "I'm not…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, promises, secret pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de secret.

The lock was hidden by a pivoting device shaped like a light switch. It was impossible to see the outline of the cupboard in the paneling of the wall. Yes, he'd be safe there. She was sure of it.The girl murmured his name and laid her palm flat on the wooden panel."I'll come back for you later. I promise.

texto: I wanted to cry, but the tears did not come.
explicacao: Citação de Tatiana de Rosnay sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I wanted to cry, but the tears did not come.” articula reflexao, dismay, sorrow em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como sorrow.

texto: Sometimes, Miss Jarmond, it's not easy to bring back the past. There are unpleasant surprises. The truth is harder than ignorance
